heading: Visiting fellows at National Weather Service
label: 8544 Visiting fellows at National Weather Service

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Director of the National Weather Service may establish a program to host postdoctoral fellows and academic researchers at any of the National Centers for Environmental Prediction.

children.heading: Goal
children.label: b Goal
children.text: This program shall be designed to provide direct interaction between forecasters and talented academic and private sector researchers in an effort to bring innovation to forecasting tools and techniques to the National Weather Service.

children.heading: Selection and appointment
children.label: c Selection and appointment
children.text: Such fellows shall be competitively selected and appointed for a term not to exceed 1 year.
